articles.title: $72.3M deal gives Federal Realty more control of major retail hub in Maryland
articles.summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust recently acquired a 25% interest in the Montrose Crossing shopping center in Rockville, Maryland, for $72.3 million. This purchase increases Federal Realty's ownership to 75% of the 350,000-square-foot center, which is anchored by Giant Food and Target. The deal reflects Federal Realty's strategy to bolster its presence in high-barrier-to-entry markets and continue investing in its core portfolio.

articles.title: Target Corp. stock underperforms Wednesday when compared to competitors despite daily gains
articles.summary: Target Corp. stock saw a gain of 3.01% on Wednesday, closing at $123.12, but still underperformed compared to the broader market and its competitors. The S&P 500 Index rose 2.51% and the Dow Jones Industrial Average gained 2.85%. Despite the daily climb, Target Corp. closed 2.29% short of its 52-week high.
